narrative:
Delaware County has 167,033 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.2 percentage points. Gen X are the largest generational cohort at 29.2% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -0.2% D−R vs -24.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
